violations.text: Per PIC, the drainage system for the dishwasher and 3-bay is leaking in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Both fixtures have been taken out of service and facility is using disposable utensils and dishware until drainage system is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine located in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by dishes and knifes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment PIC has food safety manager training but is not registered with the state. PIC is to register with the state. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2023

The three bay sink is backing up into the dishwasher, causing the dishwasher to leak. The Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to contact RIDOH and send evidence once correction has been made. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
